name:
lake. There's shore to North,
South & East
description:
I'm in a lake. There's shore to North,
South & East
hints: You're swimming in the volcanic lake! Shore is visible in several directions and a ledge to the west.
SWIM directions to move. You can drown if carrying too much! Drop heavy items before swimming.
SWIM DOWN to explore the lake bottom. GO LEDG or SWIM WEST to reach the volcano wall ledge. GET WATE with empty bottle.
SWIM=volcano (8). SWIM DOWN=lake bottom (13). GO LEDG/SWIM WEST=ledge (18). Carrying items causes drowning!

effects: Message: ledge in the wall of the volcano

notes: Volcanic lake. SWIM=volcano (8). SWIM DOWN=lake bottom (13). GO LEDG/SWIM WEST=ledge (18). Drowning if carrying too much. GET WATE with empty bottle. TREA WATE=death.
